reviews.label: Reviews
reviews.title: What the FGC is Saying
reviews.description: Top players and community members are already using FightersTech to level up.

reviews.name: GG | Tibetano
reviews.text:
This app helps you find all Tekken 8 tournaments (and more games) in your area.

It also allows you to create a profile so you can play with people who are looking for the same MU training as you. It's perfect!

It takes a lot of work so give it a try💪

reviews.name: TEKKEN España
reviews.text: 📲 The @fighterstech app has been launched! Besides receiving notifications for upcoming online and offline tournaments, users can search for other players by character, skill level, and more! Perfect for getting into the community.

reviews.name: Oracle_99
reviews.text:
I've been testing the @fighterstech APP for a while now and I love it.

Here is my profile card if anyone wants to add me.

I'll be checking it on nights I don't stream to find matches.

Great job @Xiscoteon

reviews.name: Los Pibardos
reviews.text:
You still don't have the @fighterstech app installed? I'd be embarrassed.

It's a quick and easy way to find people to play your favorite fighting game with, play friendly matches, learn matchups, find out about tournaments, etc.

I don't know what you're waiting for.

reviews.name: Castellón Fighters
reviews.text: Take a look at this app to find out about all the tournaments we host

reviews.name: CARD | Winters_XI → VSFighting XIV
reviews.text:
@notLiquidRuss It's an app they've worked hard on to find matches for many fighting games, tournaments, create a profile and links, etc etc... it literally just came out

https://x.com/fighterstech/status/1932029011258982807?s=61

reviews.name: UchihaJorg
reviews.text: Guys, here's a useful app. Looking for tournaments in the area? A character is giving you trouble and you don't know how to stop them? This is your app. Give it a try, it costs nothing and can contribute a lot to the Spanish FGC. A little help so we can stop being terrible. 💪🏻💪🏻

reviews.name: Marc Comeche
reviews.text: I'm very hyped for this app ngl. From now on I'll try to post all the tournaments there, so download it to stay up to date!

reviews.name: DM | DoctorGus
reviews.text:
FightersTech is now available, an App made by @Xiscoteon to help people find matches, improve MUs and not miss a single offline event for their favorite game

No more saying "I didn't know there was a tournament in my city" ever again, you're out of excuses

reviews.name: TKB | KingCuidador!!
reviews.text: Guys this is a gem that any FG community needed, it's extremely well done and very intuitive too.

reviews.name: RKS | Nanaki Snake ★ (a.k.a. Alberto)
reviews.text:
If anyone wants to play some FTs, remember you can challenge me through the FightersTech app.
We could practically look for any afternoon to play ^^

reviews.name: StarUP
reviews.text:
You can check out @fighterstech although I guess you already know it... but just in case, let @Xiscoteon know if you have any questions.

We also sometimes have trouble picking dates and honestly, we spend a lot of time looking for the best option for everyone...

reviews.name: DreamMakers | Akamaru
reviews.text:
We have two extra things for today

First, @Xiscoteon from @fighterstech will come to present the new APP updates

And Corrales is out for casting, but it's fine because @Oracle_Javier is stepping in... In 2 hours!

reviews.name: RKS | VV Joe Velltza
reviews.text: Just a reminder that you have a massive update for @fighterstech with hyper-detailed settings for the specific notifications you want to receive for the exact games you want! Couldn't be more personalized!!

reviews.name: RKS | Niigacio
reviews.text: Ft7 vs Hauresito testing the @fighterstech challenger feature. Right now on

reviews.name: RKS | Niigacio
reviews.text: Link your @fighterstech with your discord and you'll get cool alerts like this one 🫠

reviews.name: Abadass
Castellón Fighters
reviews.text: Remember that with the @fighterstech app you can check all the tournaments we run so you don't miss a single one

reviews.name: xkarsy
reviews.text: @fighterstech @Nowtemp And for those who like #Blazblue we have a small tournament in two weeks in Valencia. Hope to see you there! 🗿

reviews.name: GG Stadium | Energizer
reviews.text: I'm checking it out today and the app is genuinely great!!

reviews.name: 🦝 Maca 🦝
reviews.text:
Great reminder because I always lose track of time haha. Let's see if I make it home in time 🫡
GGs @fighterstech

reviews.name: RKS | Nanaki Snake ★ (a.k.a. Alberto)
reviews.text:
If you compete in any Fighting Game this app is great for registering all the tournaments around you and finding out about everything.
Plus you can search for matchups and some other things.
Give it a try because it's super useful

reviews.name: 🎮KoS | UnoQuePasa🕹️
reviews.text: God tier app! 100% recommended 💪💪💪

faqItems.title: What is FightersTech and what is it for?
faqItems.description:
FightersTech is the ultimate application designed to help fighting game players find matches seamlessly and ensure they never miss a local or global competitive event.

Its core features include:
  • Find and organize matches: Search for rivals using advanced filters (specific characters, region, wired LAN or Wi-Fi connection). You can challenge players, propose a date and time, decide if the set will be public or private, and manage it all with our check-in system.
  • Tournament notifications: Stay updated on tournaments organized in your area. Set up custom alerts for your favorite games, defining the search radius, specific coordinates, and the exact time you want to be notified.
  • Detailed player profiles: Create your Player Card specifying your game, rank, main, and secondaries. Link your social media, gaming platform, and define your playstyle based on a 'brain, body, and heart' score.
  • Integrated schedule and calendar: Track your sent match proposals, add tournaments directly to your calendar to set reminders, and quickly access the physical venue location or the official bracket link.

faqItems.title: How can I find fighting game tournaments near me?
faqItems.description:
To find local fighting game tournaments near you using FightersTech, you just need to set up our powerful event alert system.

Follow these simple steps:
  1. Create your profile: You must have a game profile set up for the titles you want to track.
  2. Access settings: Go to the 'Profile' section in the app and select 'Tournament Notifications'.
  3. Select your games: Choose the specific titles you want to follow.
  4. Define your search area: Set your preferred distance metric (miles or kilometers) and configure your coordinates so the app scans your specific local area.
  5. Schedule your alerts: Choose the exact time you prefer to receive these notifications.
Once saved, you will receive notifications allowing you to filter tournaments by game and country, check the venue's location, visit the official tournament link, and even add it to your in-app schedule so you never forget a bracket.

faqItems.title: Which fighting games are supported on the app?
faqItems.description:
FightersTech supports all major competitive fighting games currently in the scene, as well as beloved retro FGC classics. Our database includes:
  • Super Smash Bros. (Ultimate and Melee)
  • Tekken 8 and Tekken 7
  • Street Fighter 6, Street Fighter V, Ultra Street Fighter IV, SFIII: 3rd Strike, and Super Street Fighter II X
  • 2XKO
  • Mortal Kombat 1 and Mortal Kombat 11
  • Guilty Gear Strive
  • Dragon Ball FighterZ
  • Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves
  • Rivals of Aether 2
  • Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising
  • Ultimate Marvel vs. Capcom 3
  • Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes
  • BlazBlue: Central Fiction
  • The King of Fighters XV
  • Soulcalibur VI
  • DNF Duel
And we are constantly adding new releases! If your main game is missing, don't hesitate to tag us on social media so we can get it added!

faqItems.title: How does Matchmaking work on FightersTech?
faqItems.description:
Matchmaking on FightersTech relies on a highly customizable search and match proposal system, secured with a check-in process—perfect for both tryhard training sessions and casual sets.

Here is how it works step by step:
  1. Search and filters: Find rivals by specifying the exact character you want to practice against (or leave it open). Apply detailed filters like region and connection type (wired or Wi-Fi) to ensure lag-free matches.
  2. Issue your challenge: Browse the list of potential opponents, tap 'actions,' and choose 'propose date' to select the exact day and time for your set.
  3. Match conditions: Specify the character you will use and set the rules. Decide if the match will be 'public' or 'private,' choose the win condition (e.g., First to 3), and confirm your proposal summary.
  4. Manage your schedule: Keep track of who you’ve challenged and cancel pending proposals directly from the 'Sent Schedule' section.
  5. Check-in and Fight: If your opponent accepts, a check-in option will appear 10 minutes before the agreed time. Both players must complete it to confirm attendance. Once checked in, you will receive a notification with specific instructions on where to play or who to invite, depending on each game's lobby system.

faqItems.title: Is FightersTech free to use?
faqItems.description: Yes, downloading and using the core features of FightersTech is completely free. Our main goal is to grow the fighting game community by providing everyone with free access to our matchmaking tools, tournament locator, and player profiles, available on both iOS and Android.
